top_signals.title: Bezos brushes off concerns of an AI bubble: 'You shouldn't worry about it'
top_signals.summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos shrugged off concerns of a looming AI bubble, saying the massive investments will ultimately drive the technology forward over time.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bezos says 2-3 year timeline for space data centers is a 'little ambitious'
top_signals.summary: Space companies are racing to make data centers in space a reality, as artificial intelligence skyrockets demand for energy and land resources.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: RBI to Inject $5 Billion Equivalent Cash Via Swap Auction
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank will inject liquidity to the equivalent of $5 billion via a swap auction, it said in a statement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
